---
title: Quick Start
---

DataverseNL can be accessed via SURFconext. Make sure to [log in](https://dataverse.nl/loginpage.xhtml?redirectPage=dataverseuser.xhtml) with your institution credentials. 

To deposit or publish data, you need permissions from the Vrije Universiteit. Please contact [rdm@vu.nl](rdm@vu.nl) to request access to create and upload dataset.

For practical information please visit the [DataverseNL website](https://dans.knaw.nl/en/data-services/dataversenl/user-guide/).
